In `_gather_inputs()`: - `plan_saved_plan_number: int | None = None` → `plan_saved_pr_number: int | None = None` (line 727) - `plan_saved_plan_number = read_plan_saved_marker(...)` → `plan_saved_pr_number = read_plan_saved_marker(...)` (line 735) - `plan_number: int | None = None` → `pr_number: int | None = None` (line 758) - `plan_number = (` → `pr_number = (` (line 774) - `plan_saved_plan_number=plan_saved_plan_number` → `plan_saved_pr_number=plan_saved_pr_number` (line 795) - `plan_number=plan_number` → `pr_number=pr_number` (line 805)

7. In `determine_exit_action()`, around line 546-549: - `plan_title=hook_input.plan_title` stays (plan_title is plan-as-concept) - `plan_number=hook_input.plan_number` → `pr_number=hook_input.pr_number`
Do NOT rename: - `plan_title` field or parameter (this is plan-as-concept, stays) - `plan_file_path` field (plan-as-concept, stays) - `plan_saved_marker_exists` field (plan-as-concept, stays) - `extract_plan_title` function (plan-as-concept) - `format_plan_next_steps_plain` function (plan-as-concept) - `snapshot_plan_for_session` function (plan-as-concept) - `plan_num` local variable in determine_exit_action (this is a display variable) - `build_step2_message(plan_number=plan_num)` - The parameter name on build_step2_message stays because it represents a plan number for display - The local `plan_num` rename should not happen either - it's just an intermediate variable that hold the value from `plan_saved_pr_number`
session.assistant: I'll read the file first to understand its structure and then perform the renaming operations.
session.tool_result:
1→#!/usr/bin/env python3 2→"""Exit Plan Mode Hook. 3→ 4→Prompts user before exiting plan mode when a plan exists. This hook intercepts 5→the ExitPlanMode tool via PreToolUse lifecycle to ask whether to save to GitHub 6→or implement immediately. 7→ 8→Exit codes: 9→ 0: Success (allow exit - no plan, implement-now marker present, or no session) 10→ 2: Block (plan exists, no implement-now marker - prompt user) 11→ 12→This command is invoked via: 13→ erk exec exit-plan-mode-hook 14→ 15→Marker File State Machine 16→========================= 17→ 18→This hook uses marker files in .erk/scratch/sessions/<session-id>/ for state management. 19→Marker files are self-describing: their names indicate their purpose and their contents 20→explain their effect. 21→ 22→Marker Files: 23→ exit-plan-mode-hook.implement-now.marker 24→ Created by: Agent (when user chooses "Implement without saving") 25→ Effect: Next ExitPlanMode call is ALLOWED (exit plan mode, proceed to implementation) 26→ Lifecycle: Deleted after being read by next hook invocation 27→ 28→ exit-plan-mode-hook.plan-saved.marker 29→ Created by: /erk:plan-save command (both new-branch and current-branch paths) 30→ Content: First line is the plan PR number
... [866 lines omitted] ...
403→ f"⚠️ WARNING: Currently on '{current_branch}'. "
